title: Airpods Mod
description: Adds wearable Airpods to the game because why not
body:
Adds wearable 3d Airpods to the game

To wear them, put them in your helmet slot


**Normal Airpods are purely cosmetic**

![Normal Airpods are purely cosmetic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2b3b7b284a3d3b8d9f5cfe9dba608aade276b41.png)

**Airpods Pro still wont make you good at the game but are slightly overpowered (note that the enchantments are only added once you equip the airpods)**

![Airpods Pro still wont make you good at the game but are slightly overpowered (note that the enchantments are only added once you equip the airpods)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9eaa15b03bf672760ebb48a0ec6dee1a06d98aa5.png)
# **vvv RECIPES vvv**

**Recipe for Airpods**

![Recipe for Airpods](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5107d73f8c0909782a62700fb6645b090687bed.png)

**Recipe for Airpods Pro**

![Recipe for Airpods Pro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e9f3c8389f2700d55e75cf8340f23b643d82f30.png)

Feel free to use this in your **Modrinth** modpack
